channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Meet Morgan Stanley Technology (Virtual Information Session)
item.description: This session is for RPI students interested in pursuing a summer internship or full-time opportunity in financial services technology. Students will meet with business representatives from the firm to gain valuable career advice and mentorship. Register on Handshake here: https://rpi.joinhandshake.com/events/1920821/share_preview
item.author: Students

item.title: RPI Student Film Festival: Submit Your Film!
item.description: The RPI Student Film Festival is back for its fifth annual celebration of student creativity, presented by UPAC Cinema and the Arts Department. This festival provides university-level filmmakers a platform to exhibit their work, bridging cinematic production with critical social, scientific, and intellectual discourse. We are now seeking short film submissions from student creators. Deadline for Entry: March 31, 2026
item.author: Students

item.title: Attention: First-Year Students & Graduating Seniors
item.description: Help Us Improve Your RPI Experience Share Your Voice! Take the National Survey of Student Engagement (NSSE) survey to help RPI improve your educational experience. Check your email for your personal invitation to participate!
item.author: Students

item.title: Phalanx Tapping Ceremony (RSVP)
item.description: Date: Saturday, March 28, 2026 4:30 PM - 7:00 PM - Come support the new inductees of the Phalanx Honor Society as well as White Key and Honorary Phalanx members. The Phalanx Tapping Ceremony will be held on March 28, 2026 at 4:30 PM at the Heffner Alumni House Great Hall. The event is free, but registration is required. Light appetizers and refreshments will be available.
item.author: Community

item.title: BME Seminar Series
item.description: Date: Thursday, March 19, 2026 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM - Dr. Anand Kumar of Harvard Medical School lectures on Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging for Preclinical and Clinical Applications
item.author: Community

item.title: Tire-derived chemicals, mRNA purification, and more
item.description: A snapshot of some of the latest research from RPI experts.
item.author: Community

item.title: Faculty & Staff Commencement Information
item.description: The March 20th deadline for regalia is quickly approaching! Please visit the Faculty & Staff Information page to confirm your attendance and place your regalia order. All members participating as a member of a stage party for commencement or hooding for Ph.D. are required to wear regalia.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Rensselaer Faculty and Staff In Person Workshop - Deeper Dive into the Active Learning Approaches of Jigsaw, Think/Pair/Share, & Visual Maps
item.description:
Date: Wednesday, April 1, 2026 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM - In this workshop, we will focus on the three active learning concepts of the Jigsaw activity, Think/Pair/Share and working with Visual Maps/Charts. We will spend some time on each of these three approaches, discussing the concept of each and looking at examples to help you think about how you might be able to incorporate the approach into your class as an activity. Please register by March 27th using the Event URL in the See section of the…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
